sqlReaderQuery.value:
WITH db2_data AS (
    select SUBJ_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD
    from @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC
    where CYC_STTUS_CD = 'RUNNING'
       and SUBJ_CD = '@{variables('Subject')}'
       and TRGT_SYS_CD = '@{variables('Target')}'
    UNION
    select SUBJ_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD
    from @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC
    where CYC_STTUS_CD = 'RUNNING'
       and SUBJ_CD = '@{variables('Subject')}'
       and SRC_SYS_CD <> '@{variables('Source')}'
       and TRGT_SYS_CD = '@{variables('Target')}'
    UNION
    select SUBJ_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD
    from @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC
    where CYC_STTUS_CD = 'RUNNING'
       and SUBJ_CD = '@{variables('Subject')}'
       and SRC_SYS_CD = '@{variables('Source')}'
),
transformed_data AS (
    SELECT SUBJ_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD
    FROM db2_data
)
SELECT COUNT(*) as link_count FROM transformed_data

parameters.subject: MEDTRAK to EDW load for RX data - Weekly Control Totals File- Extract Abort - Stop Loss
parameters.body:
MEDTRAK to EDW load for RX data - Weekly RX Control File Totals for Stop Loss - process cannot run while other processess  being updated or extracted from.


Source: MEDTRAK
Target:  EDW
Subject: CLAIMS

parameters.subject: No Medtrak Control File Received for Stop Loss
parameters.body: Medtrak Control file has not been received for Stop Loss. Please contact the vendor.

parameters.subject: BCBSKC received MEDTRAK Claims and Control file for PDX to process EDW load
parameters.body:
BCBSKC received MEDTRAK Claims and Control file for PDX to load EDW Process

MEDTRAK control file has been received via FTP and has been placed in "O:\\library\\IAD\\PHI11\\Shared\\StopLoss_Control" folder with the file name starting with "Medtrak_DrugClmControl".

MEDTRAK claims file has been received via FTP and has been placed in "O:\\library\\IAD\\PHI11\\Shared\\StopLoss_Claims" folder with the file name starting with "Medtrak_DrugClm".

parameters.subject: BCBSKC received MEDTRAK Claim Control file for RX to process EDW load
parameters.body:
BCBSKC received MEDTRAK Claim Control file for RX to process EDW load

Medtrak control total file has been received via FTP and has been placed in "O:\\library\\Finance\\Finance\\Operations\\Claim_Settlements\\Data_Files\\ASO_Stop_Loss_Control_Files"  folder with the file name starting with "Medtrak_DrugClmControl".
